title: Frigiel & Fluffy
description: Unofficial Frigiel & Fluffy mod based on the book.
body:
Dive into the enchanting world of Frigiel & Fluffy with this exciting Minecraft mod that introduces three powerful types of magic: Light Magic, Water Magic, and Fire Magic. Harness the elemental forces to enhance your gameplay and bring a touch of magic to your Minecraft adventures!

## Features:

**Water Magic**: Control the flow of water to your advantage. Water Magic allows you to extinguish fire on the player, freeze entities, on/off rain, and deal damage.

**Fire Magic**: Unleash the fury of flames upon your enemies. Fire Magic enables you to burn entities.

**Light Magic (Secondary Magic)**: Use light to teleport, strike with lightning any enemies, and heal yourself.

## Commands:

/essence <add/set/remove> <player> <number>: Manage the essence points of players. Add, set, or remove essence points to control the power level of their magic abilities.

/selectpower: Choose your preferred type of magic. Switch between Water and Fire Magic to adapt to different challenges and environments.

**UNOFFICIAL MOD BASED ON FRIGIEL & FLUFFY BOOK**
